title: astelia petriei
intro: Astelia petriei, also known as Wire Rāhui or Astelia, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Astelia petriei include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically harvested and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
